c5c43e71-0991-4923-abad-7755eb230f6b.name: addToCart
c5c43e71-0991-4923-abad-7755eb230f6b.query: mutation AddToCart($variantId: ID!, $quantity: Int!) { addItemToOrder(productVariantId: $variantId, quantity: $quantity) { __typename ... on Order { id totalQuantity } ... on ErrorResult { errorCode message } } }

7a44a326-2c68-4d7f-9266-c83457ef057b.name: addToCartFromCard
7a44a326-2c68-4d7f-9266-c83457ef057b.query: mutation AddToCart($variantId: ID!, $quantity: Int!) { addItemToOrder(productVariantId: $variantId, quantity: $quantity) { __typename ... on Order { id totalQuantity } ... on ErrorResult { errorCode message } } }

16fcea3b-13a7-4a58-b890-d2fc91ee0408.name: removeFromCart
16fcea3b-13a7-4a58-b890-d2fc91ee0408.query: mutation RemoveFromCart($lineId: ID!) { removeOrderLine(orderLineId: $lineId) { __typename ... on Order { id totalQuantity } ... on ErrorResult { errorCode message } } }

d5907b1b-3ecf-40b0-b150-6eb47c8d5733.name: adjustCartItemQuantity
d5907b1b-3ecf-40b0-b150-6eb47c8d5733.query: mutation AdjustCartItem($lineId: ID!, $quantity: Int!) { adjustOrderLine(orderLineId: $lineId, quantity: $quantity) { __typename ... on Order { id totalQuantity } ... on ErrorResult { errorCode message } } }

26266968-8914-4e63-acfe-338ca69a0095.name: decrementCartItem
26266968-8914-4e63-acfe-338ca69a0095.query: mutation AdjustCartItem($lineId: ID!, $quantity: Int!) { adjustOrderLine(orderLineId: $lineId, quantity: $quantity) { __typename ... on Order { id totalQuantity } ... on ErrorResult { errorCode message } } }

7e13b3e3-daf0-430b-83b8-0447ad9a94c3.name: incrementCartItem
7e13b3e3-daf0-430b-83b8-0447ad9a94c3.query: mutation AdjustCartItem($lineId: ID!, $quantity: Int!) { adjustOrderLine(orderLineId: $lineId, quantity: $quantity) { __typename ... on Order { id totalQuantity } ... on ErrorResult { errorCode message } } }

85346c1c-0613-4776-9cba-3a7c3172a764.name: applyPromotionCode
85346c1c-0613-4776-9cba-3a7c3172a764.query: mutation ApplyPromotionCode($couponCode: String!) { applyCouponCode(couponCode: $couponCode) { __typename ... on Order { id code totalWithTax couponCodes discounts { description amountWithTax } } ... on ErrorResult { errorCode message } } }

9d025c9c-1fef-460d-9238-faec04029ad6.name: removePromotionCode
9d025c9c-1fef-460d-9238-faec04029ad6.query: mutation RemovePromotionCode($couponCode: String!) { removeCouponCode(couponCode: $couponCode) { id code totalWithTax couponCodes discounts { description amountWithTax } } }
